title: Community Moderation Update
body:
Today's moderation actions:

🚫 **Banned users:**
- spam_wave_42 (phishing links across 6 channels)
- toxic_runner (targeted harassment against newcomers)

⚠️ **Warned users:**
- trusted_helper (reminded about professional conduct)
- new_member_17 (off-topic posting guidance)
- bot_like_user_77 (suspicious automation clarification)

✅ **False positive resolved:**
- Report against core_maintainer dismissed (brigading incident)

All 6 open reports have been reviewed and closed. Our community standards prioritize safety while ensuring fair treatment. Thank you for helping keep our community healthy!
